name: (Communications) I have an important or emotionally charged letter or email to write.
(Communications) I have critical information to discuss with a group or individual.
(Communications) I am preparing to conduct an interview.
(Communications) I want to improve my relationship with an individual, team, or work group.
(Communications) I want to improve either my, or my teams` effectiveness.
(Communications) I want to improve teamwork.
(Conflict Management) Me or my team are in conflict with another person or work group.
(Conflict Management) I am preparing to negotiate.
(Conflict Management) I am preparing to make a purchase.
(Conflict Management) There has been a fight or argument amongst employees.
(Conflict Management) There are two or more strong opposing views on a team or a work group I am overseeing.
(Conflict Management) I need to discover new options to resolve a dilemma or impasse.
(Conflict Management) A new process-focused method is needed to resolve an issue, or select a direction.
(Decision Making) There is an important decision to make.
(Decision Making) There are multiple good options or solutions available.
(Decision Making) A key decision has to be made.
(Decision Making) A process focused method is needed to select a direction or option.
(Discipline) A team or individual performance has fallen below acceptable levels.
(Discipline) Coaching has failed to work, and performance or behavior needs to improve.
(Discipline) Other methods of behavior or performance improvement have proven not to work.
(Discipline) An employee has broken an organization policy or rules.
(Discipline) A person needs to take responsibility for performance gaps or problems.
(Innovation and Creativity) New ideas are needed to improve or solve a problem.
(Innovation and Creativity) It seems all ideas have been exhausted.
(Innovation and Creativity) New and creative ways are needed to stimulate improvements.
(Innovation and Creativity) Out-of-the-box thinking is needed by an individual or a team.
(Interviewing and Hiring) A new team member needs to be selected or added to a team.
(Interviewing and Hiring) I am preparing for an interview.
(Interviewing and Hiring) I am preparing to be interviewed.
(Layered Process Audits) A new process has been established and needs to be reinforced.
(Layered Process Audits) Critical processes need to be mistake or error-proofed.
(Layered Process Audits) Standard work for leaders is being implemented.
(Layered Process Audits) Corrective actions have been implemented, and follow-up is needed to ensure compliance.
(Layered Process Audits) It is desired to connect leaders with critical process parameters and outcomes.
(Leadership and Coaching) A leader or supervisor is new to an area or assignment.
(Leadership and Coaching) An individual or team wants to become a high performing team or individual.
(Leadership and Coaching) An individual or team wants to improve their effectiveness.
(Leadership and Coaching) An individual or team wants to learn more about themselves or each other.
(Leadership and Coaching) I wish to better understand an individual or teams strengths and weaknesses.
(Leadership and Coaching) I am striving for improvements.
(Leadership and Coaching) I am trying to build trust and mutual support in this organization.
(Managing Change) Change is occurring in an organization or team.
(Managing Change) Resistance to change is prevalent in an organization or team.
(Managing Change) Change and improvement is desired for an individual or team.
(Meeting Leading) I am preparing to lead a meeting.
(Meeting Leading) A meeting has ended, and the next steps are needed.
(Motivation) I am designing and working to implement a reward system.
(Motivation) I wish to better understand why people do what they do.
(Motivation) I wish to improve individual or team morale.
(Motivation) I want to help people to motivate themselves to higher achievement.
(Performance Management and Goal Setting) Goals and objectives are being established for teams and/or individuals.
(Performance Management and Goal Setting) A group or individual is not performing up to expectations.
(Performance Management and Goal Setting) People working on team goals claim that they do not know what to do or what needs improvement.
(Performance Management and Goal Setting) I would like to improve overall productivity, quality, and timeliness.
(Performance Reviews) Feedback needs to be communicated to a team, team member, or leader.
(Performance Reviews) I am preparing to document an employee`s performance record.
(Performance Reviews) A new leader has been given a leadership assignment.
(Performance Reviews) I am designing a performance management system.
(Policy Deployment) Goals and measures are being developed for an organization or team.
(Policy Deployment) The overall values, mission, and vision need to be established and communicated.
(Policy Deployment) There are random and/or too few improvements being implemented.
(Policy Deployment) Focus and alignment is needed so people can motivate themselves to improve.
(Policy Deployment) Improvement is needed.
(Problem Solving) Technical problems need to be contained and resolved.
(Problem Solving) Performance has declined in an area, and the cause is unknown.
(Problem Solving) Mistake or error-proofing is needed.
(Problem Solving) A consisten process-focused method is needed to help resolve a problem.
(Problem Solving) The root cause(s) of an observed condition needs to be discovered.
(Process Improvement) Improvement in cost, quality, productivity, delivery, or performance is needed.
(Process Improvement) Teams are not sure how to make improvements.
(Process Improvement) Internal or external competition has become more successful than you or your team.
(Process Improvement) Waste needs to be eliminated from a process.
(Process Improvement) A consistent process-focused method is needed to help improve performance.
(Process Improvement) A project is initiated with an individual or group.
(Project Management) Multiple projects are running concurrently.
(Project Management) A systematic approach to implementing a plan or iniative is needed.
(Project Management) A new large assignment with multiple tasks has been assigned to an individual or team.
(Project Management) Steps to complete a task or initiative need to be organized and prioritized.
(Remote Supervising) Be careful not to micro-manage the employee just because they are not physically present.
(Remote Supervising) Hold employees accountable to their goals and have them report their success, or lack of, to you each week.
(Remote Supervising) Keep all promises and respond to employees in a timely manner just as if they were in the building or in close proximity.
(Remote Supervising) Show that you value and acknowledge remote employees by asking for their feedback - people do not care how much you know until they know how much you care.
(Reward and Recognition) Individuals or teams need to be congratulate or reprimanded.
(Reward and Recognition) Good performance or behavior needs to be recognized or rewarded.
(Reward and Recognition) Poor or unacceptable behavior or performance needs to be corrected.
(Reward and Recognition) I am designing a reward system.
(Reward and Recognition) I need to correct first time or small behavior and/or performance issues.
(Stakeholder Analysis) I am currently initiating a new project.
(Stakeholder Analysis) There has been resistance to change and improvements.
(Stakeholder Analysis) A solution or solutions to a problem are currently being implemented.
(Stakeholder Analysis) I need to resolve interpresonal or interteam conflicts or disagreements.
(Standard Work for Leaders) I would like to improve leader efficiency and effectiveness.
(Standard Work for Leaders) I am implementing continuous improvements in an organization or area.
(Standard Work for Leaders) Leaders would like to get serious about improving their performance.
(Stress Management) Stress prevention and recognition are needed for an individual or group.
(Stress Management) An organization or individual has been under a great deal of stress.
(Stress Management) Emotions amongst a group, or that of an individual, are running high.
(Stress Management) Interpersonal or interteam conflicts are observed and/or being resolved.
(Team Selection and Building) A new team is being established and selected.
(Team Selection and Building) An existing team needs some new energy.
(Team Selection and Building) A team has had failure or is performing poorly.
(Team Selection and Building) Significant performance improvement is needed from a team.
(Terminations) An employee has not corrected behavior or performance deficiencies or problems.
(Terminations) All other coaching and disciplinary efforts have failed to improve an employee`s behavior or performance.
(Terminations) An individual will not be a good long term fit for this organization or team.
(Time Management) An individual or team has been complaining about not having enough time.
(Time Management) I would like to improve an individual or teams` productivity or throughput.
(Time Management) There never seems to be enough time to get things done.
(Trust Building) Individuals or teams are in conflict.
(Trust Building) I would like to improve morale, commitment, and loyalty.
(Trust Building) I would like to create a motivating environment, where individuals and teams can motivate themselves to high levels of success and achievement.
(Trust Building) Communications have broken down between individuals or teams.
(Trust Building) Feelings have been hurt in some way.
(Valuing Diversity) A new team is being established and selected.
(Valuing Diversity) An existing team needs some new energy.
(Valuing Diversity) A team has had failure or is performing poorly.
(Valuing Diversity) A new member is being selected for a team.
(Valuing Diversity) Significant performance improvement is needed from a team.
(Valuing Diversity) A team thinks they are better without certain new team members.
(Valuing Diversity) An individual thinks they can do things better by themselves.
